svg.title: SvetlanaClaw connected to Azure Speech Services
svg.desc: Voice notes flow through Azure Speech ASR into SvetlanaClaw on OpenClaw, and explicit voice replies are synthesized through Azure Speech TTS using a Russian Svetlana neural voice.
svg.text: SvetlanaClaw voice loop with Azure Speech
Russian-capable ASR and explicit TTS sit around the OpenClaw runtime; text remains the default interface.
TEXT BY DEFAULT · CLOUD SPEECH WHEN EXPLICITLY REQUESTED
